allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'try { $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\('\\''C:\\Users\\Mark Arnold\\.nuget\\packages\\mudblazor\\9.2.0\\lib\\net10.0\\MudBlazor.dll'\\''\); $t = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch [System.Reflection.ReflectionTypeLoadException] { $t = $_.Exception.Types | Where-Object { $_ -ne $null } }; $t | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq '\\''InputMode'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName; if \($_.IsEnum\) { [System.Enum]::GetNames\($_\) -join '\\'', '\\'' } else { '\\''not enum'\\'' }; '\\''---'\\'' }')

Bash(powershell -Command '$ErrorActionPreference='\\''SilentlyContinue'\\''; $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\('\\''C:\\Users\\Mark Arnold\\.nuget\\packages\\mudblazor\\9.2.0\\lib\\net10.0\\MudBlazor.dll'\\''\); try { $t = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch { $t = $_.Exception.Types }; $t | Where-Object { $_ -and $_.Name -eq '\\''InputMode'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.FullName; if \($_.IsEnum\) { Write-Host \([System.Enum]::GetNames\($_\) -join '\\'', '\\''\) } }')

Bash(powershell -Command '$ErrorActionPreference='\\''SilentlyContinue'\\''; $dll = '\\''C:\\Users\\Mark Arnold\\.nuget\\packages\\mudblazor\\9.2.0\\lib\\net10.0\\MudBlazor.dll'\\''; $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\($dll\); $tt = $null; try { $tt = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch [System.Reflection.ReflectionTypeLoadException] { $tt = $_.Exception.Types }; Write-Host "TypeCount: $\($tt.Count\)"; foreach \($x in $tt\) { if \($x -and $x.Name -eq '\\''InputMode'\\''\) { Write-Host "FOUND: $\($x.FullName\) IsEnum=$\($x.IsEnum\)"; if \($x.IsEnum\) { Write-Host \([System.Enum]::GetNames\($x\) -join '\\'', '\\''\) } } }')

Bash(powershell -Command '$ErrorActionPreference='\\''SilentlyContinue'\\''; $dll = '\\''C:\\Users\\Mark Arnold\\.nuget\\packages\\mudblazor\\9.2.0\\lib\\net10.0\\MudBlazor.dll'\\''; $asm = [System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadFile\($dll\); $tt = $null; try { $tt = $asm.GetTypes\(\) } catch [System.Reflection.ReflectionTypeLoadException] { $tt = $_.Exception.Types }; foreach \($x in $tt\) { if \($x -and $x.Name -like '\\''*Mode*'\\''\) { Write-Host $x.FullName } }')
